Container.Name: site-manager
Container.Overview:
Site Manager - Admin Interface
Professional CV/Resume and personal site management with full editing capabilities. Create, manage and organize your professional CV with:
• Visual career timeline with country flags • ATS-optimized formatting • Granular visibility control • Profile picture and company logo support • Print/PDF optimization • JSON import/export • Multiple CV datasets • Cloudflare Access authentication support
ADMIN VERSION - Full CRUD access. Protect with Cloudflare Access or a password — see SESSION_SECRET and ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH variables below.
TIP: Also install "Site Manager Public" for a read-only shareable version on port 3011 that uses the SAME appdata path.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Database storage. IMPORTANT: Use the same path for both Admin and Public containers to share data.

Config.Name: Uploads
Config.Description: Uploaded images (profile picture, company logos). IMPORTANT: Use the same path for both Admin and Public containers.

Config.Name: DB Path
Config.Description: Path to the SQLite database inside the container (leave as default)

Config.Name: Session Secret
Config.Description: Required when using password or Cloudflare Access auth. Set to a long random string.

Config.Name: Admin Password Hash
Config.Description: Bcrypt hash of your admin password. Leave blank to disable local password auth. Generate on the host with: node -e 'const b=require("bcryptjs");b.hash("yourpassword",10).then(console.log)'

Config.Name: Trust Cloudflare Access
Config.Description: Set to true if the admin interface is behind Cloudflare Access. Trusts the Cf-Access-Authenticated-User-Email header.

Config.Name: Allowed Emails
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of emails allowed via Cloudflare Access. Leave blank to allow all authenticated CF users.

Config.Name: Cookie Secure
Config.Description: Set to true when accessed over HTTPS (recommended for Cloudflare Tunnel setups)

Config.Name: Upload Max MB
Config.Description: Maximum file size in MB for image uploads (profile picture, logos)
